'''''Nova Whisper''''' was a modified [[Lantillian ShipWrights/Legends|Lantillian ShipWrights]] [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|GX1 Short Hauler]] with a checkered history and long list of owners. The original owner was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] commodities shipper by the name of [[Tev Driscull]]. He soon lost it at [[Elshandruu Pica]] to a [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] named [[Dharus]] who upgraded the weaponry to have 2 concealed [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers and replaced the forward firing laser cannon with an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]]. The ship also possessed military-grade sensors and terrain-following scanners in addition to 2 shielded [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] compartments; one hidden in engineering and the other in the starboard [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]].<ref name="Stock Ships" />

The ship soon was captured by the [[Corellian Security Force]]s, also known as CorSec, who determined that the ''Nova Whisper'' would make an excellent ship for sting operations against smugglers and [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] since it was a legitimate smuggling craft. The ship was used in a joint CorSec-Imperial operation where it was once again stolen, this time by the pilot, [[Delt Nerris]], who was an Alliance sympathizer.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

The ''Nova Whisper'' was used by the Alliance forces on [[Asher III]] as a [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical transport]] until the destruction of that Rebel cell just prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. The Imperials did not get their hands on the ship as it was filched by a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] arms merchant by the name of [[Lernik De'Yago]] who used it to escape the raid on the Alliance cell.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

De'Yago coded a series of credit-account access numbers into the [[Navigation computer/Legends|nav computer]]. Since De'Yago had lost the shipment of arms he had been delivering to the Alliance before he received payment he decided to recoup his losses. Accordingly he sold the Nova Whisper to a ship dealer on the merchant station [[Bazaar (Ithorian Herdship)|''Bazaar'']].<ref name="Stock Ships" />

The ship dealer stripped many of the modifications made by De'Yago off the craft and then auctioned it off.<ref name="Stock Ships" />
